steps.t: Moss was once used to protect growing trees from insects. Moss can be found along the river.
Quickbeam needs to ponder how best to support the seed's growth. Return to Quickbeam at Derndingle to hear what he has to say.
Quickbeam has figured out what mulch is next needed for the seed. Quickbeam is ready to speak to you at Derndingle.
Quickbeam wishes to next honour his friend by treating his seed with mulch made from Nerbyg. Nerbyg can be found in the northern area of Fangorn.
